title: Bannerbear reached $6K MRR
raw_signal: Bannerbear reached about $6K MRR roughly a year after launch after a pivot, rebrand, feature work, customer feedback, content, newsletter updates, and marketing-site improvements.
rights_note: Stored as metadata, short summary, and structured facts only.

title: Carrd grew to $2M ARR by limiting features
raw_signal: Carrd focused on a simple website builder for a small enthusiastic segment in a crowded market and was reported by Indie Hackers at about $167K monthly revenue.
rights_note: Stored as metadata, short summary, and structured facts only.

title: Inkdrop 独立开发者成长路径
raw_signal: Takuya Matsuyama 从自由职业技术服务逐步把时间转向个人产品 Inkdrop，订阅收入覆盖基本生活后全职投入，并用公开内容积累长期信任。
